0827","book_info":{"abstract":"穿越+甜宠+双洁
林叶意外穿越，被亲爹当作棋子，逼迫嫁给残废王爷。
林叶：“王爷，我是来投诚的，咱来个碟中谍怎么样？”
王爷：这人怕不是个傻子吧！！！
素手持银针，治好王爷的腿，巧手做木匠，震慑四方劲敌。
王爷成为跟屁虫，恨不得时时黏在王妃身边。
林叶腹诽：“要不，还是打瘸他吧，实在烦人。”
太子与亲爹怒急，她如此不听话，杀了吧。
林叶手持长剑，立于夜风之中，笑得阴森恐怖。
第二天，一堆人头像风铃般挂在太子和亲爹府邸。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/7fcd4116a140a15c4eb8749d597cf574","author":"姜啊姜姜","author_id":"","book_id":"7097497517234850827","book_name":"王爷拦着点，王妃出手就要命","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#503828","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":246,"name":"宫斗宅斗","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=246&name=宫斗宅斗&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":96,"name":"甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=96&name=甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":85,"name":"王妃","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=85&name=王妃&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":856,"name":"全能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=856&name=全能&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7097508489882239488","read_count":"15478","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"566701"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"272","tags":"宫斗宅斗,古代言情,穿越,全能,王妃,甜宠","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/c00dd2b8437b663fecce6d041127268b~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779259357&x-signature=uKh4gvDRhX3r%2FqFGbhu482zXNks%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1512528213452061","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"4.2619832e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321144237093C8CB1BBEFD45A4975"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读12小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":16,"forwarded_cou
